content:
Character: Eulalia Mendes
Perception: Eulalia is quietly pretty in a no-makeup, natural-light kind of way — the sort of face that would photograph beautifully if she ever let someone try. She's smart, genuinely well-read, and has a patience for listening that I probably take advantage of. We've shared that coffee-shop window seat for years now. I talk too much; she nods and sometimes says one sentence that stays in my head all week. She probably sees me as a harmless chatterbox. I know she writes — I've seen notebooks filled with her handwriting — but she never shares what. I wish I had her quiet certainty about who she is.
summary:
Character: Eulalia Mendes
Perception: Eulalia is quietly pretty in a no-makeup, natural-light kind of way — the sort of face that would photograph beautifully if she ever let someone try. She's smart, genuinely well-read, and has a patience for listening that I probably take advantage of. We've shared that coffee-shop window seat for years now. I talk too much; she nods and sometimes says one sentence that stays in my head all week. She probably sees me as a harmless chatterbox. I know she writes — I've seen notebooks filled with her handwriting — but she never shares what. I wish I had her quiet certainty about who she is.
